description: Corpus-level guards for structured-text indexing. These assert EMITTED ROWS, not config. array_block shipped dead in 0.109.2 because its only test asserted that json.json DECLARED a block group — never that a block row appeared; scan_block_run walked raw siblings, so JSON's `,` separators broke every run at the first comma and a 201-element array scanned as a run of ONE. Exact-only asserts, so 'at least one' is written as LIMIT 1 + row_count 1.

cases.name: array_block_row_is_actually_emitted
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'array_block' IN 'crates/forgeql/tests/corpus.json' LIMIT 1

cases.name: array_kind_is_emitted_not_merely_documented
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'array' IN '.github/workflows/ci.yml' LIMIT 1

cases.name: workflow_step_without_a_name_key_is_addressable
cases.fql: SHOW outline OF '.github/workflows/ci.yml' ALL WHERE fql_kind = 'object' WHERE name = 'uses' LIMIT 1
